description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a symmetrical facade and a gable roof. The front of the house is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns, and the entryway is flanked by two palm trees. Large windows are arranged in even rows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella, as well as several trees and landscaped elements. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a combination of concrete, glass, and metal materials. The overall design is clean and contemporary, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, a covered porch, and a backyard pool area, surrounded by landscaping and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, two palm trees, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and the side landscaping with trees and palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, supported by columns, flanked by palm trees, and accessed via a paved driveway.
